creator: bmah@ca.sandia.gov
text:
The net/vncjava-3.1.1 port is obsolete and unnecessary.  It contains
the Java classes for a VNC client.  The net/vnc-3.3.2 port includes these
files automatically, so there's no need for a separate port.

(Apologies, I should have filed this PR when I did the vnc-3.3.2 port.)

Fix: 

Nuke it.
